<!--
PR title format: [COMPANY] [TARGET] AGL-N Imperative description
  COMPANY: Focela (internal team) | Community (individual or external contributor)
  TARGET:  MAIN | DEV
Examples:
  [Focela] [MAIN] AGL-12 Add OpenTelemetry tracing
  [Focela] [DEV] AGL-12 Add OpenTelemetry tracing
  [Community] [MAIN] AGL-12 Add OpenTelemetry tracing
-->

## Description

<!-- State what changed and why. Keep this section short. -->

## Type of change

<!-- Mark the applicable type with [x]. Follows Conventional Commits. -->

- [ ] `feat` - New feature
- [ ] `fix` - Bug fix
- [ ] `docs` - Documentation change
- [ ] `refactor` - Internal refactor without behavior change
- [ ] `perf` - Performance improvement
- [ ] `test` - Test addition or fix
- [ ] `ci` - CI/CD pipeline change
- [ ] `build` - Build system or dependency change
- [ ] `chore` - Maintenance task
- [ ] `!` - Breaking change (append `!` to the type, e.g. `feat!`)

## Changes

<!-- List code-level changes. Reference file paths when useful. -->
<!--
- Updated <path> to <effect>.
- Added <path> for <purpose>.
-->

## Testing

<!-- List manual or automated checks. Mark completed checks with [x].
     Attach a screenshot of the command output (800–1200 px wide, cropped
     to output area only). The text must be readable without clicking to enlarge. -->
<!--
- [x] <command or manual check>
- [ ] Not run. Reason: <reason>
-->

## Checklist

<!-- Mark each completed item with [x] before requesting review. -->

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] Documentation updated for user-facing changes
- [ ] PR title follows the format in CONTRIBUTING.md

## Notes

<!-- Add implementation notes, compatibility notes, or follow-up work. -->

## Related PRs

<!-- Cross-reference main and develop PRs of the same ticket. -->

| PR | Branch | Description |
|----|--------|-------------|
| #  | `<type>/AGL-N` -> `main` | `<imperative description>` |

## Linked issue

<!-- Replace AGL-N with the ticket number, e.g. AGL-42. -->
